rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"decision","text":"Adding a clarifying comment is a valid fix when the behavior is correct by design but not self-explanatory to future readers.","scope":"code review"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"AdvancedContentEditor is an exercise-editor role, not a course-manager role — intentionally excluded from instructor list read access.","scope":"LMS/permissions"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When fixing review feedback, prefer the minimal appropriate solution rather than over-engineering.","scope":"PR workflow"}]}
